overview: Live Now Recovery is a privacy-first, real-time recovery and resource platform for MAT and harm reduction in Ohio. It connects people to providers, naloxone, peer support, and community volunteers while earning on-chain credentials for every contribution — no medical data ever stored.
features: Soul-bound on-chain credential badges for volunteers, counselors, and providers
Searchable volunteer directory with filterable profile cards
Full volunteer profiles with credential timeline, impact stats, and Share on X
Become a Volunteer redesign with role selector cards and clear step-by-step signup path
Privacy controls — volunteers choose public or anonymous mode
Mock seed data with 15+ realistic Ohio volunteer profiles
Public leaderboard of top contributors by impact score
Citizens Hub full-screen community reporting map
Sentinel Prediction Engine with real-time risk overlays
National hot zone visualization for expansion pitch
